resources.name: ned-activities-collection
resources.title: NED Activities collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of activity resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API. Supports default pagination when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-authorisations-collection
resources.title: NED Authorisations collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of authorisation resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API. Supports default pagination when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-classifications-collection
resources.title: NED Classifications collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of classification resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API. Supports default pagination when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-granularities-collection
resources.title: NED Granularities collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of granularity resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API. Supports default pagination when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-granularity-time-zones-collection
resources.title: NED Granularity time zones collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of granularity time zone resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API. Supports default pagination when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-points-collection
resources.title: NED Points collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of point resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API without optional filters. Default pagination applies when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-types-collection
resources.title: NED Types collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of type resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API. Supports default pagination when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-users-collection
resources.title: NED Users collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of user resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API. Supports default pagination when no query parameters are supplied.

resources.name: ned-utilizations-collection
resources.title: NED Utilizations collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of utilization resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API without optional filters. The documented default page size is 144 and the default validfrom ordering is descending.

resources.name: ned-widgets-collection
resources.title: NED Widgets collection
resources.description: Retrieves the default JSON-LD Hydra collection of widget resources from the Nationaal Energie Dashboard API without optional filters. Default ordering is descending on validfrom.
